dct_title_s: New York City Community District Tabulation Areas, 2020
dct_description_sm: New York City Community District Tabulation Areas, 2020 is a polygon theme representing New York City Planning Community District Tabulation Areas (CDTAs) in New York City for use with 2020 census data. Community District Tabulation Areas are neighborhood approximations derived by the NYC Planning Department that are built from 2020 census tracts and 2020 Neighborhood Tabulation Areas. CDTAs and meant to approximate the NYC Community Distrits. A tract to NTA to CDTA crosswalk is included in the download files.
dct_creator_sm: New York (N.Y.). Department of City Planning
dct_publisher_sm: New York (N.Y.). Department of City Planning
dct_rightsHolder_sm: New York (N.Y.). Department of City Planning
